disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Grouped lip blisters/ulcers PLUS widespread red swollen gums and mouth ulcers, with fever (first/primary episode)
trigger_question_examples: Are your gums very red and swollen with ulcers throughout the mouth, plus lip blisters and fever?
Is this the first time you've had something like this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, my gums are red and swollen with ulcers everywhere and blisters on the lips, and I've had a fever — it's the first time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unable to swallow fluids/saliva for ~18 hours with weakness and dehydration signs
trigger_question_examples: When did you last drink, and can you swallow at all? How much urine have you passed?
Do you feel dizzy or very weak?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't been able to drink since yesterday evening, I feel weak and I've passed little urine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No skin target lesions, no eye/genital sores, no drug trigger (SJS screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any target/bullseye spots on the skin, sores in the eyes or genitals, or a new medication recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No target spots on the skin, no eye or genital sores, and no new medicines.
